calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Tony Schoenberg; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Jabari Allah, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Health.
Attorney, Arnold W. Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Ralph Cooper is present.
Attorney, Jerome Schweich representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 64 Turk Street, #418, San Francisco, California.

This case did settle. The trial date of AUG-03-2009 is vacated.
